comment: The glaze colour is even nicer in person. Pours evenly and the carafe keeps coffee hot for ages.
Beautiful set. The filter cone is slightly narrow for thicker filter papers, but works great with the recommended ones.
Sturdy and the warm light is perfect for evening reading. Arm holds its position without drifting.
Print quality is excellent, colours are rich without being garish. Looks great framed in oak.
Pieces feel substantial in hand and the board folds away neatly. Great gift.
Lovely texture and warmth, slightly heavier than expected but that's a plus for cold evenings.
